sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka lung sungah la ngaih hong kisa, Jesuh hong hopihna hi;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: mawhna’n su gawp zo, Lungsim sia, natna dimsak;
Jesuh’n asia teng hong lepsak zo,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong hehpihna pha tawh kivakin, A kha nuai ka beelzo ta;
Awngin la ka sa thei ta.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A sawt lo-in hong pai kik ding
hi, Van ah hong la to dingin;
Theih loh gamah ka leeng to ding hi,
